name: HOME BANCORP, INC.
business: Home Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company whose wholly-owned subsidiary, Home Bank, N.A., attracts deposits from the general public and originates loans, including one-to four-family mortgage loans, commercial real estate loans, construction loans, and commercial and industrial loans. The Company operates 43 banking offices in south Louisiana, west Mississippi, and southeast Texas.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in south Louisiana
Individuals and businesses in west Mississippi
Individuals and businesses in southeast Texas

exposures.sentence: The oil and gas industry has a significant presence in the market areas in which we operate.

The occurrence of fraudulent activity, breaches or failures of our information security controls or cybersecurity-related incidents could have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition, results of operations and growth prospects.
More recently, innovations in loan and deposit products brought about by financial technology companies have added to the level of competition for originating loans and attracting deposits.
Our lending activities include loans secured by commercial real estate and commercial and industrial loans.
Our principal sources of funds are customer deposits, repayments of loans, repayments of investments and funds borrowed from outside sources such as the Federal Home Loan Bank (FHLB) of Dallas.
